raw.official description: Gain 50 overhealth when you use your Ultimate and for each enemy ignited by it.
raw.ability details:
* Overhealth decays 4 seconds after hitting the ground/becoming actionable.
* Works with either Ultimate.

abilities.name: Hungering Blaze

raw.official description: Increase the healing of Dancing Blaze's subsequent strikes by 25.
raw.ability details:
* Can fully heal back to 250 HP if 5 targets are hit.
* Healing is not reduced by the global healing reduction passive.

abilities.name: Ignition

raw.official description: Hit enemies with fire attacks to burn them.
raw.damage:
10 per second (base)
20 per second (fan the flames)
raw.ability details: * Upon accumulating 100% ignition on a target, they will be ignited. ** Ignition less than 100% resets to 0% after 4 seconds if not increased by igniting attacks.. * Affects [[Deployables]], such as turrets or [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]], but not [[Barrier]]s.

10 per second (base)

raw.official description: Impacting an enemy with Inferno Rush reduces its cooldown by 1.5 seconds.
raw.ability details:
* Impacting multiple enemies will reduce the cooldown by 1.5 per each hit.
* If all 5 enemies are hit, it will be reduced by 7.5 seconds (for a 1 second cooldown).

* Increases duration of [[Status effect#Burning|burning]] triggered by Ignition to 4.5 seconds.
* Does not increase the duration of critical burning from Fan the Flames.

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Propel yourself forward and damage enemies you impact.
raw.ability details:
* Anran can automatically climb over small ledges.
* Anran has 20% increased Jump height.
* 50% ignition on enemies hit, 33% on tanks.
* Can provide an initial vertical boost if the ability is activated while looking up.
* The ability makes the player to go in the direction they are facing.
** Using the ability locks them out of moving left or right, forcing them to go forward.
* Can be canceled early by pressing Quick Melee.

abilities.name: Dancing Blaze

raw.shot type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
raw.official description: Dodge all damage while striking nearby enemies, healing yourself for each enemy hit.
raw.duration: 0.8 seconds (base) + 0.16s (bonus per target if base ends)
raw.ability details:
* Healing is not reduced by the global healing reduction passive.
* Movement range of 2.25 meters.
* 50% ignition on enemies hit, 33% on tanks.

abilities.name: Zhuque Fans

raw.official description: Hand fans that shoot fiery projectiles.
raw.fire rate: 1.5 volleys/s
raw.ability details:
* Damage per second: 66 while firing (53.88 w/ reload) (while not burning)
*Damage per second: 76 while firing (63.88 w/ reload) (while burning)
* 25% ignition per shot hit, 17% on tanks.
** Takes 4 hits (2 volleys) to trigger ignition, 6 hits (3 volleys) for tanks.
** Ignition % gained is affected by headshots.

abilities.name: Fan the Flames

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability_Moira_Coalescence.png|sub|40x40px|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Beam|Beam ]] Beam (projectile)
raw.official description: Hot wind blasts that amplifies burning damage.
raw.fire rate: 1.5 shots/s
raw.ability details: *Damage per second: 54 while firing (44.06 w/ reload) (while not burning) *Damage per second: 128 while firing (108.13 w/ reload) (while burning) * 25% ignition per shot hit, 17% on tanks. ** Takes 4 hits (4 volleys) to trigger ignition, 6 hits (6 volleys) for tanks. * Amplifies [[Status effect#Burning|burning]] damage from 10 to 20 damage per second, for 2 seconds. ** The burning duration is refreshed each time the target is hit (while burning). ** Does not refresh the duration of burns applied by allies (such as from [[Ashe]]'s [[File:Ability-ashe2.png|sub|link=Ashe#Dynamite|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#Dynamite|Dynamite]] or [[Torbjörn]]'s [[File:Ability-torbjorn5.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Molten Core|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Molten Core|Molten Core]]) ** The burning damage can be amplified, regardless of the source (such as from [[Ashe]]'s [[File:Ability-ashe2.png|sub|link=Ashe#Dynamite|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#Dynamite|Dynamite]]). * If Ignition is triggered by Fan the Flames, the critical burning affect is still applied. *Unlike other beam weapons, this weapon can be amplified by [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]].

abilities.name: Vermillion Ascent
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement

raw.shot type:
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Charge forward, exploding on impact and instantly igniting enemies.
raw.ability details:
* Targets hit receive 100% ignition.
* Targets hit are knocked towards the point of impact.
* The radius is spherical from the point of impact.
* If targeted at a player, the landing zone will automatically be set below the player (when launched).
* If targeting an area out of range, Anran will travel the furthest distance possible, then explode.

abilities.name: Vermillion Revival
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: When dead, revive yourself in a fiery explosion.
raw.damage:
10 damage over time
55 - 30 (area of effect)
raw.ability details: * There is a 0.048 second delay before Anran can start shooting again. * Targets hit receive 100% ignition. * Can be cast up to 5 seconds after death. * Unlike Vermillion Ascent, this ultimate does not pierce [[barriers]] but does ignore [[Armor]]'s damage reduction. * Can be targeted by [[File:Ability-ana4.png|sub|link=Ana#Nano Boost|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ana#Nano Boost|Nano Boost]], [[File:Ability-mercy1.png|sub|link=Mercy#Caduceus Staff|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mercy#Caduceus Staff|Caduceus Staff]], [[File:Tidalblast.png|sub|link=Wuyang#Tidal Blast|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Wuyang#Tidal Blast|Tidal Blast]] and [[File:Ability-zenyatta2.png|sub|link=Zenyatta#Orb of Harmony|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zenyatta#Orb of Harmony|Orb of Harmony]]. * Benefits from [[File:Ability-Lucio4.png|sub|link=Lúcio#Sound Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lúcio#Sound Barrier|Sound Barrier]] during revival. * If Anran dies with Vermillion Revival available, both allies and enemies will see a flame above her corpse, indicating that Anran can use it. * [[File:Ability-mercy5.png|sub|link=Mercy#Resurrect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mercy#Resurrect|Resurrect]] cannot be used on Anran while reviving with Vermillion Revival and vice versa. Whichever was activated first will have priority.
